creator: woot-woot@yandex.ru
text:
9.3-STABLE FreeBSD 9.3-STABLE #0 r276292
ports updated today

building whole system with ports from zero, i removed my make.conf completely and run make:

#cd /usr/ports/audio/opus-tools/
#make
